---
name: New stat source request
about: Suggest a statistical source to add to the catalog
title: '[SOURCE] Add <source name> to <category>'
labels: 'new-source-request, good-first-issue'
assignees: ''
---

## Source

- **Name:**
- **URL:**
- **Category:** (one of `core/*` or `industries/*` in `references/stat_sources/`)
- **Tier:** 1 (essential) / 2 (supplementary)

## Why this source

What it adds that current sources don't cover.

## Quick metadata

- **Type:** Government / Industry / Academic / Aggregator / Vendor
- **Access:** OPEN / PARTIAL / PAYWALL / FREE_LIMITED
- **What's inside:** 1-2 sentences
- **Best use case:**

## Are you willing to submit a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I'll add the full entry following the template in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] No, but I'd like someone to add this
